description: Make WasmPlot Makie-like API work end-to-end inside Therapy.jl @island effects compiled to WASM

stories.title: Two-pass autodiscovery fixes stubbing
stories.completedNote: Two-pass autodiscovery in _autodiscover_closure_deps! fixed stubbing (25→3 warnings, only error paths remain)

stories.title: Math function stubbing
stories.completedNote: Same autodiscovery fix covers math functions

stories.title: Therapy 'Has effect: false'
stories.completedNote: Investigation proved effect IS compiled and wired correctly. The diagnostic check `contains(result.js, 'effect')` was misleading — WASM effects run through funcref table + _rt_flush, not explicit JS 'effect' code. Verified: (1) _effect_0 exported at func index 72, (2) 21 canvas2d imports present, (3) funcref table has 2 entries, (4) _rt_flush(BigInt(3)) triggers all effects, (5) WASM validates clean with wasm-tools, (6) effect body calls canvas2d.clear_rect, fill_rect, set_fill_rgb etc. API-001/002 autodiscovery fixes resolved the underlying compilation issue.

stories.title: End-to-end browser verification
stories.description: Serve the InteractivePlot island in a browser and verify canvas rendering works — freq buttons change the sine wave
